gemini_api_key_description: Enter API key for Google Gemini. The key is used for text recognition from PDF files.
exchange_rate_api_key_description: Enter API key for ExchangeRate API (optional). If not specified, free API exchangerate-api.com will be used.
exchange_rate_api_key_hint: Get your key at exchangerate-api.com, fixer.io or other service. Leave empty to use free API.
gemini_model_description: Select Gemini model for text recognition from PDF. You can enter model name manually or choose from suggested ones.
gemini_model_hint: Available models: gemini-2.5-flash (recommended), gemini-2.5-pro, gemini-2.0-flash-exp, gemini-1.5-flash, gemini-1.5-pro
onboarding_sub: Track expenses, visualize your money, and keep things simple.

decision.title: Financial state
decision.insight_overall_lead_high: You are spending faster than usual for this time of day.
decision.insight_overall_lead_medium: You are probably spending above your usual pace for this time of day.
decision.insight_overall_lead_low: It looks like today’s spending by this time is above your typical pattern.
decision.insight_category_lead_high: In «{category}» you are clearly above your usual pace today.
decision.insight_category_lead_medium: You are probably spending more than usual in «{category}» by this time.
decision.insight_category_lead_low: It looks like «{category}» is running higher than usual for this time of day.
decision.insight_detail: By {time} you are usually around {usual}; today already {current} — about {excess}% above your norm.
decision.runway_days: At this pace, today’s month surplus could cover about {days} more days of spending.

list.title: Transactions
list.empty: No expenses yet. Add the first record!

form.title: New entry
form.scan_failed: Failed to recognize receipt. Try taking a clearer photo.
form.category_uncertain_hint: Category was inferred from similar past entries — change it if needed.

learning.remember_prompt: Remember this category for similar notes?

delete.title: Delete category?
delete.message: Transactions with this category will remain, but without category.

import.title: Import
import.pdf_description: Import from PDF file (supports files exported from the app)
import.pdf_error: Failed to extract data from PDF
import.pdf_error_details: The PDF file uses complex compression that is not supported by the current version of the app.
import.pdf_alternative1: • Export data from Kaspi app to CSV/JSON
import.pdf_alternative3: • Copy text from PDF and paste into CSV file
import.pdf_alternative4: • Use files exported from this app

recurring.title: Subscriptions
recurring.name: Name
recurring.empty_hint: Create a subscription to automatically generate transactions
recurring.delete_message: The subscription will be deleted, but already generated transactions will remain.

backup.title: Backups
backup.subtitle: Create and restore backup copies
backup.create_description: Create a backup of all your data (transactions, categories, budgets, debts and rules)
backup.created_message: Backup created successfully. You can share the file or save it in a safe place.
backup.restore_description: Restore data from a previously created backup
backup.restore_confirm_message: All current data will be replaced with data from the backup. This action cannot be undone.
backup.delete_message: This backup file will be deleted from the device.

slide1.title: Track Your Expenses
slide1.description: Easily add income and expenses with categories and notes. All your transactions in one place.

slide2.title: Analyze Your Finances
slide2.description: View charts and statistics on your spending to better understand your finances and find opportunities to save.

slide3.title: Budgets and Limits
slide3.description: Create budgets by categories and periods. Track progress and get notifications when limits are exceeded.

slide4.title: Debt Management
slide4.description: Track debts and loans. Keep records of what you owe and what is owed to you, with automatic transaction creation.

slide5.title: Import and Backups
slide5.description: Import data from CSV, JSON, and PDF files (including bank statements). Create local backups to protect your data.

slide6.title: Security
slide6.description: Protect your financial data with biometric authentication (Face ID / Fingerprint).

budget.title: Budgets
budget.name: Name
budget.warning_threshold_hint: You'll get a warning when reaching this percentage
budget.notifications_hint: Receive notifications when approaching the limit
budget.empty_message: Create a budget to control expenses by category or set an overall limit
budget.delete_message: Budget "{0}" will be deleted. This won't affect your transactions.

rules.title: Categorization Rules
rules.empty_message: Create rules for automatic categorization of transactions during import

debts.title: Debts
debts.empty_they_owe: No one owes you yet. Add the first debt!
debts.delete_message: Debt "{0}" will be deleted. This won't affect transactions.

biometric.title: Biometric
biometric.not_available: Biometric authentication is not available on this device
biometric.enable_reason: Enable biometric authentication to protect the app
biometric.info_available: Your device supports {0}. You can use it to protect the app.
biometric.info_not_available: Biometric authentication is not available on this device.
biometric.info_description: When biometric authentication is enabled, the app will require authentication on launch and after minimizing.

delete_all_expenses_message: All expenses and income will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone. It is recommended to create a backup before deleting.
